guard_summary.scope: Only global record kind entity considered.
exclusions: Excluded aliases already present in data/identity-overrides/merges.json.
Excluded entity aliases already prepared in visible codex identity prep batches through identity120.
Checked data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json entity pairs for the proposed target/alias pairs.
Skipped low-confidence role/person, committee/member, office/person, agency/subunit, broad label, and source-time false-friend candidates.
guard_summary.durable_shape_reminder: data/identity-overrides/merges.json stores alias_id -> target_id entries; each proposal names target_id and alias_id explicitly.
guard_summary.proposal_filter: High-confidence exact durable entity identity only; no provider-backed or external LLM commands.

command_evidence.purpose: Located relevant deterministic identity, review-note, and canonical entity files.
Confirmed durable merge override shape uses alias_id -> target_id entries under aliases.<kind>.
Built visible prepared-entity alias exclusion set through identity120.
Grouped canonical entity records by deterministic normalized entity names and filtered aliases absent from applied merges and prior prep files.
Inspected target and alias record names, types, source ids, aliases, and evidence refs for candidate proposals.

command_evidence.command: jq -r --argjson pairs '[...] ' '(.pairs.entity // []) as $dnm | $pairs | map(. as $p | {pair:$p, blocked:any($dnm[]; ((.record_ids|index($p[0])) and (.record_ids|index($p[1]))))})' data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
command_evidence.purpose: Verified proposed target/alias pairs are not listed in do-not-merge.
